task: place the grasped yellow block inside the right cabinet
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A yellow block is held by the gripper. The right cabinet is open and empty. The task is to place the block inside the cabinet. STRATEGY - Transport the block from the current position to the cabinet, then place it inside. Failure modes include dropping the block during transport or misaligning it with the cabinet opening. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 transport the block to the cabinet; Step 2 place the block inside the cabinet.
Goal: inside(yellow_block, right_cabinet)
Scene: yellow_block, right_cabinet
Step 1: transport(yellow_block -> right_cabinet)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the right cabinet
  spatial: inside(yellow_block, right_cabinet) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: inside(yellow_block, right_cabinet)
Step 2: place(yellow_block -> right_cabinet)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the right cabinet
  contact: surface_contact(yellow_block, right_cabinet) [completion]; released(yellow_block) [completion]
  pose: stable(yellow_block) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(yellow_block, right_cabinet) AND released(yellow_block)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: an empty area inside the right cabinet
